user_input: Make a website for an organization responsible for monitoring the government. It will monitor all available informnation including budget, audits, investigations, etc, and will issue papers and notifications about politics, economics and other such topics about a certain government. Make the government the pakistani government. The organization is socialist so the theme should be light red and white.

content:
Got it — government watchdog site for Pakistan, socialist light-red and white palette. Let me lock in the details:

<question-form id="task-type" title="Choose the task type">
{
  "description": "I'll route this through the right Open Design workflow and lock the brief in one shot. Skip what doesn't apply — I'll fill defaults.",
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": "taskType",
      "label": "What should I build?",
      "type": "radio",
      "required": true,
      "options": [
        "Prototype",
        "Live artifact",
        "Slide deck",
        "Image",
        "Video",
        "HyperFrames",
        "Audio",
        "Other"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "audience",
      "label": "Who is this for?",
      "type": "text",
      "placeholder": "e.g. Pakistani citizens, journalists, activists, researchers"
    },
    {
      "id": "scale",
      "label": "Roughly how much?",
      "type": "text",
      "placeholder": "e.g. 1 landing page, landing + 3 sub-pages, 5 screens"
    },
    {
      "id": "constraints",
      "label": "Any important constraints?",
      "type": "textarea",
      "placeholder": "Sections you want, specific features, things to avoid..."
    }
  ]
}
</question-form>
